_comment: Drop this into the www.dbot.dog Vercel project's vercel.json. It rewrites /dogechain-pulse/* to the dogechain-pulse.vercel.app project, so the canonical URL is www.dbot.dog/dogechain-pulse/ while the actual site lives in its own Vercel project (auto-deployed from GitHub). No DNS, no SSL, no separate domain. To add more DBOT projects, append more entries to the rewrites array.
